description: You are an IT Helpdesk Technician. Process the five pending hardware requests in the Snipe-IT system. Fulfill the requests for Sarah Jenkins (Lenovo ThinkPad X1, Asset Tag LPT-8001), David Chen (Dell UltraSharp 27, Asset Tag MON-8002), Maria Garcia (1 unit of Apple Magic Mouse), and Robert Taylor (1 unit of HP 64X Black Toner). Deny James Smith's request for an iPad Pro 12.9 as company policy requires VP approval for tablets. The task is complete when the 'Requested' queue is empty and all items have been correctly processed according to these requirements.
